This PR introduces a new loader class, `UniversalDocumentLoader`, which follows the **Strategy Pattern** to dynamically delegate document loading to the appropriate loader class based on the file type. It aims to simplify file ingestion in LangChain applications that deal with a variety of document formats (e.g., PDF, RTF, TXT).
